hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then staged=$(git -C /home/xi/docker/nene-concierge diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.tsx?$' || true); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then echo '[hook] Frontend .ts/.tsx files are staged. Running type-check before commit...' >&2; cd /home/xi/docker/nene-concierge && npm run type-check --prefix frontend 2>&1 || { echo '[hook] ❌ Type check failed — commit blocked.' >&2; exit 2; }; echo '[hook] ✅ Type check passed.' >&2; fi; fi
